name: Service.Dict
comment:
`Service.Dict`s provide the exact same functionality as Elm's built-in `Dict` type, while allowing for easy and safe extension with custom key types.

@docs Dict, max, foldl, foldr, fromList, get, isEmpty, previous, member, middle, next, remove, min, filter, size, insert, keys, values, map, update, singleton, toList

    module MyRecordDict exposing (MyRecordDict, fromList, get {- , ... all the other implementations -})

    import Service.Dict as Dict exposing (Dict)
    import Sort exposing (Sorter)

    type MyRecordDict v
        = MyRecordDict (Dict MyRecord v)

    type alias MyRecord =
        { foo : Int, bar : String }

    sorter : Sorter MyRecord
    sorter =
        Sort.by .foo Sort.int
            |> Sort.and (Sort.by .bar Sort.string)

    fromList : List ( MyRecord, v ) -> MyRecordDict v
    fromList =
        Dict.fromList sorter

    get : MyRecord -> MyRecordDict v -> Maybe v
    get record (MyRecordDict dict) =
        Dict.get sorter record dict

    -- ... all the other implementations

unions.name: Dict
unions.comment: A mapping of unique keys to values.

values.name: filter
values.comment: Keep key-value pairs that pass the filter.
values.type: Sort.Sorter k -> Filter.Filter ( k, v ) -> Service.Dict.Dict k v -> Service.Dict.Dict k v

values.name: foldl
values.comment: Reduce the key-value pairs in the dictionary from lowest to highest.
values.type: (k -> v -> b -> b) -> b -> Service.Dict.Dict k v -> b

values.name: foldr
values.comment: Reduce the key-value pairs in the dictionary from highest to lowest.
values.type: (k -> v -> b -> b) -> b -> Service.Dict.Dict k v -> b

values.name: fromList
values.comment: Convert an association list into a dictionary.
values.type: Sort.Sorter k -> List.List ( k, v ) -> Service.Dict.Dict k v

values.name: get
values.comment: Get the value of a key in the dictionary.
values.type: Sort.Sorter k -> k -> Service.Dict.Dict k v -> Maybe.Maybe v

values.name: insert
values.comment: Insert a value at the given key.
values.type: Sort.Sorter k -> k -> v -> Service.Dict.Dict k v -> Service.Dict.Dict k v

values.name: isEmpty
values.comment: Check if the dictionary is empty.
values.type: Service.Dict.Dict k v -> Basics.Bool

values.name: keys
values.comment: Get a list of the keys in the dictionary.
values.type: Service.Dict.Dict k v -> List.List k

values.name: map
values.comment: Apply a function to each value in the dictionary.
values.type: (k -> a -> b) -> Service.Dict.Dict k a -> Service.Dict.Dict k b

values.name: max
values.comment: Get the highest key-value pair in the dictionary.
values.type: Service.Dict.Dict k v -> Maybe.Maybe ( k, v )

values.name: member
values.comment: Check if the given key exists in the dictionary.
values.type: Sort.Sorter k -> k -> Service.Dict.Dict k v -> Basics.Bool

values.name: middle
values.comment: Get the middle key-value pair of the dictionary.
values.type: Service.Dict.Dict k v -> Maybe.Maybe ( k, v )

values.name: min
values.comment: Get the smallest key-value pair in the dictionary.
values.type: Service.Dict.Dict k v -> Maybe.Maybe ( k, v )

values.name: next
values.comment: Get the next highest key-value pair in the dictionary
values.type: Sort.Sorter k -> k -> Service.Dict.Dict k v -> Maybe.Maybe ( k, v )

values.name: previous
values.comment: Get the next smallest key-value pair in the dictionary.
values.type: Sort.Sorter k -> k -> Service.Dict.Dict k v -> Maybe.Maybe ( k, v )

values.name: remove
values.comment:
Remove a key from a dict. If the key is not found,
no changes are made.
values.type: Sort.Sorter k -> k -> Service.Dict.Dict k v -> Service.Dict.Dict k v

values.name: singleton
values.comment: Create a dictionary with one entry.
values.type: k -> v -> Service.Dict.Dict k v

values.name: size
values.comment: Get the number of entries in the dictionary.
values.type: Service.Dict.Dict k v -> Basics.Int

values.name: toList
values.comment: Convert a dictionary to an association list.
values.type: Service.Dict.Dict k v -> List.List ( k, v )

values.name: update
values.comment: Update the value of the given key.
values.type: Sort.Sorter k -> k -> (Maybe.Maybe v -> Maybe.Maybe v) -> Service.Dict.Dict k v -> Service.Dict.Dict k v

values.name: values
values.comment: Get a list of the values in the dictionary.
values.type: Service.Dict.Dict k v -> List.List v

name: Service.Set
comment:
`Service.Set`s provide the exact same functionality as Elm's built-in `Set` type, while allowing for easy and safe extension with custom element types.

@docs Set, max, foldl, foldr, fromList, isEmpty, previous, member, middle, next, remove, min, toList, map, insert, filter, singleton, size

    module MyRecordSet exposing (MyRecordSet, fromList, member {- , ... all the other implementations -})

    import Service.Set as Set exposing (Set)
    import Sort exposing (Sorter)

    type MyRecordSet
        = MyRecordSet (Set MyRecord)

    type alias MyRecord =
        { foo : Int, bar : String }

    sorter : Sorter MyRecord
    sorter =
        Sort.by .foo Sort.int
            |> Sort.and (Sort.by .bar Sort.string)

    fromList : List MyRecord -> MyRecordSet
    fromList =
        Set.fromList sorter

    member : MyRecord -> MyRecordSet -> Bool
    member record (MyRecordSet set) =
        Set.member sorter record set

    -- ... all the other implementations

values.name: filter
values.comment: Keep items that pass the filter.
values.type: Sort.Sorter k -> Filter.Filter k -> Service.Set.Set k -> Service.Set.Set k

values.name: foldl
values.comment: Reduce the elements in the set from lowest to highest.
values.type: (k -> b -> b) -> b -> Service.Set.Set k -> b

values.name: foldr
values.comment: Reduce the elements in the set from highest to lowest.
values.type: (k -> b -> b) -> b -> Service.Set.Set k -> b

values.name: fromList
values.comment: Convert a list into a set.
values.type: Sort.Sorter k -> List.List k -> Service.Set.Set k

values.name: insert
values.comment: Insert an element in the set.
values.type: Sort.Sorter k -> k -> Service.Set.Set k -> Service.Set.Set k

values.name: isEmpty
values.comment: Check if the set is empty.
values.type: Service.Set.Set k -> Basics.Bool

values.name: map
values.comment: Apply a function to each element in the set.
values.type: (a -> b) -> Service.Set.Set a -> Service.Set.Set b

values.name: max
values.comment: Get the highest element in the set.
values.type: Service.Set.Set k -> Maybe.Maybe k

values.name: member
values.comment: Check if a value is in the set.
values.type: Sort.Sorter k -> k -> Service.Set.Set k -> Basics.Bool

values.name: middle
values.comment: Get the middle value of the set.
values.type: Service.Set.Set k -> Maybe.Maybe k

values.name: min
values.comment: Get the smallest element in the set.
values.type: Service.Set.Set k -> Maybe.Maybe k

values.name: next
values.comment: Get the next highest element in the set.
values.type: Sort.Sorter k -> k -> Service.Set.Set k -> Maybe.Maybe k

values.name: previous
values.comment: Get the next smallest element in the set.
values.type: Sort.Sorter k -> k -> Service.Set.Set k -> Maybe.Maybe k

values.name: remove
values.comment:
Remove a key from a set. If the key is not found,
no changes are made.
values.type: Sort.Sorter k -> k -> Service.Set.Set k -> Service.Set.Set k

values.name: singleton
values.comment: Construct a set with one element.
values.type: k -> Service.Set.Set k

values.name: size
values.comment: Get the number of elements in the set.
values.type: Service.Set.Set k -> Basics.Int

values.name: toList
values.comment: Convert a set to a list.
values.type: Service.Set.Set k -> List.List k
